pi_items.source: Verified via freemed_env/data/patients.sql header ('Patients generated by Synthea synthetic health data generator') and the '.synthea.test' email domain.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic patient data generated by Synthea, confirmed by dataset headers and email domains. The target patient is Luann Sanford (ID 19, DOB 1977-03-26). Her original contact details (address: 843 Hettinger Bay, Worcester, MA 01607; phone: 617-555-7470; email: luann.sanford@synthea.test) are confirmed in the base SQL dataset. The new demographic values (127 Franklin Street, Springfield, MA 01103; phone: 617-555-9283; email: luann.s.updated@healthmail.test) exactly match the task description requirements.
